title: Section 32
content: Any person may be nominated as a candidate for election to fill a seat 1*** if he is qualified to be chosen to fill that seat under the provisions of the Constitution and this Act 2*** 3[or under the provisions of the Government of Union Territories Act, 1963 (20 of 1963), as the case may be.]
footnote: 1. The words "in any constituency" omitted by Act 27 of 1956, s. 15 (w.e.f. 28-8-1956). 2. Certain words and figures omitted by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956. 3. Ins. by Act 20 of 1963, s. 57 and the Second Schedule (w.e.f. 13-5-1963).
